howTheTestRan: the PACKAGED v0.2.0-rc.1 binary artifact was checksum-verified, unpacked, and launched in the real Hyprland 0.55.4 session with the real HOME; an AT-SPI driver (tools/live_scenario_harness/manual_rc_test_driver.py, run by tools/live_scenario_harness/run_manual_rc_test.sh) performed the interactions and every mutating step was verified through read-only hyprctl readback with zero-residue checks; the wrapper verified the active config bytes (sha256), gaps_in, monitor geometry, and the autoreload flag were identical before and after
interactionHonesty: the driver performs REAL interactions on the real running app (page navigation, spin/switch manipulation, button activation) - it is automation-driven rather than human-driven, recorded below as real-interaction-automated; the two config-writing controls were deliberately NOT activated because the app's own embedded policy prohibits GTK automation from activating them

stepsPassed.step: launch RC binary from dist/v0.2.0-rc.1 in the real session
stepsPassed.evidence: artifact checksums verified; binary launched with real HOME; app appeared on the AT-SPI bus
Dashboard and Hyprland text present in the live accessibility tree
sidebar navigation performed; Animation records group and Safe Live Save Mode card present

stepsPassed.step: record picker shows real-session readback values
stepsPassed.evidence: current-value label 'Current: speed 1.00 (enabled 0, bezier default)' matches the live hyprctl animations readback for the selected record

stepsPassed.step: record picker animation preview (enabled shape + speed +0.25) and Revert now
stepsPassed.evidence: Enabled switch set on, speed spin +0.25, Preview with recovery clicked; runtime readback changed; countdown status shown; Revert now restored the full record byte-identically (zero residue)

second preview armed ('Previewing live: auto-revert in 8 seconds unless you Keep changes.'); runtime changed during countdown; after the timeout the runtime reverted to the pre-test listing without any further interaction

stepsPassed.step: curve record preview (X1 +0.01) and Revert now
stepsPassed.evidence: runtime readback changed during preview; Revert now restored zero residue

stepsPassed.step: Safe Live Save Mode enable -> status -> disable
stepsPassed.evidence: Enable clicked: misc:disable_autoreload readback flipped to true; Disable clicked: readback returned to false (the pre-test state); runtime-only, no file write
Save previewed value and Save as default located in the tree with their gate descriptions

stepsPassed.step: zero runtime residue after all driven steps
stepsPassed.evidence: animations listing byte-identical to pre-test; autoreload restored; active config sha256 identical (efbb7320...); gaps_in unchanged; monitor geometry unchanged

stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.step: clicking Save previewed value (gated record save)
stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.reason: the control's own description says GTK automation must not activate it (it writes the active config); remains a human step
stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.coverage: the exact code path the button calls (gated_family_record_save_live) is live-flow-proven by env-gated tests that wrote the REAL config with byte-exact backup and restore (tests/family_record_picker_live.rs, re-passed 2026-07-13)

stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.step: clicking Save as default (persist Safe Live Save Mode)
stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.coverage: persist_safe_live_save_mode_live is live-flow-proven (tests/persist_safe_live_save_mode_live.rs): real write, reread verification, byte-exact restore

stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.step: scalar preview of general:gaps_in through the settings list UI
stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.reason: row selection through the large settings list was not driven in this pass
stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.coverage: the scalar preview executor and UI controller are live-proven by env-gated round-trip tests, and the identical supervised-preview flow was exercised through the RC UI on record-picker controls in this test

stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.step: closing the app during a counting-down preview (session-drop recovery)
stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.reason: the harness closes the app with SIGTERM, which does not exercise the in-app close-path revert; a kill-based test could leave residue, so it was not driven
stepsNotTestedThroughTheRcUi.coverage: the countdown TIMEOUT auto-revert was proven through the RC UI in this test (the stronger unattended-recovery property), and revert_if_unconfirmed session-drop behavior is unit- and live-proven at the controller level

safetyOutcome.runtimeMutationScope: reversible supervised previews and the Safe Live Save Mode runtime toggle, every one verified restored via readback

verdictForFinalRelease: pass - the packaged RC binary works against the real session: rendering, real readback, supervised preview with recovery (including the new enabled-shape control), dead-man timeout recovery, and the Safe Live Save Mode runtime gate all verified; the config-writing buttons remain human-only by policy and their underlying paths are live-flow-proven
